name: pocketbooks-sports
description: PocketBooks Sports — private betting club platform

scripts.verify: node tests/lifecycle.test.js && node tests/run.js && node tests/conflict.test.js && node tests/placement-gate.test.js && node tests/teaser-gate.test.js && node tests/sport-access.test.js && node tests/grading-audit.test.js && node tests/supabase-mirror.test.js && node tests/read-shadow.test.js && node tests/db-primary-read.test.js && node tests/parlay-math.test.js && node tests/grading-match.test.js && node tests/server-grade.test.js && node tests/host-db-read.test.js && node tests/settlement-preview.test.js && node tests/settlement-execution.test.js && node tests/weekly-rollover.test.js && node tests/schema.test.js && node tests/weekly-history.test.js && node tests/reconciliation.test.js && node tests/permissions.test.js && node tests/player-dashboard.test.js && node tests/bet-placement.test.js && node tests/cancel-bet.test.js && node tests/grading-authority.test.js && node tests/odds-validation.test.js && node tests/live-market-cache.test.js && node tests/auth-roles.test.js && node tests/auth-trust-boundary.test.js && node tests/club-scope.test.js && node tests/idempotency.test.js && node tests/session-revocation.test.js && node tests/club-memberships.test.js && node tests/atomic-ledger.test.js && node tests/transactional-engine.test.js && node tests/risk-limits.test.js && node tests/odds-snapshot.test.js && node tests/fail-closed-odds.test.js && node tests/trusted-grading.test.js && node tests/settlement-closeout.test.js && node tests/settlement-payments.test.js && echo '✅ All tests passed — safe to deploy'
